title: Build crates/tui/ Phase 3: Taffy layout, Text, Block, Row/Col
description: Next sprint after Phase 2. layout.rs (Taffy wrapper: LayoutStyle, Dimension, Direction, Edges, compute_layout), widgets/text.rs (Text, WrapMode), widgets/block.rs (Block, BorderType), widgets/row.rs + col.rs (Row, Col flexbox). Expand Element with layout_style+children. Snapshot tests for all widgets.
